CREATE TABLE date_time_test (event_id Int32, event_time DateTime64(9));
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM date_time_test WHERE event_time = makeDateTime64(2023, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 9);
SELECT event_id FROM date_time_test WHERE event_time < makeDateTime64(2023, 12, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 9);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM date_time_test WHERE event_time BETWEEN makeDateTime64(2023, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 9) AND makeDateTime64(2023, 12, 31, 23, 59, 59, 999999999, 9);
CREATE TABLE event_reports AS SELECT event_id, event_time FROM date_time_test WHERE event_time > makeDateTime64(2023, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 9);
CREATE TABLE date_time_aggregate AS SELECT event_id, count(*) as occurrence, toStartOfHour(event_time) as hour_block FROM date_time_test GROUP BY event_id, hour_block;
INSERT INTO date_time_test SELECT event_id + 10, makeDateTime64(2023, month, 15, hour, 30, 45, 0, 0) FROM (SELECT 5 as month, 10 as hour);

SELECT event_id, makeDateTime64(year, month, day, hour, minute, second, precision) as created_time FROM (SELECT 2023 as year, 2 as month, 28 as day, 23 as hour, 59 as minute, 59 as second, 0 as precision) WHERE created_time IS NOT NULL;
